{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Impulse Drive
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Impulse Drive]] is a propulsion system for ships.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c31">''The Captain'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
